message:
🐛 Skip fetching in demo mode to prevent console errors (#582)

Add isDemoModeForced guards to data fetching functions that use
kubectl proxy or REST API endpoints. This prevents:
- "Agent unavailable in demo mode" errors
- net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED errors on /api/* endpoints
- WebSocket connection failures

Functions fixed:
- fetchLLMdModels - skip kubectl proxy in demo mode
- fetchLLMdServers - skip kubectl proxy in demo mode
- fetchProwJobs - skip kubectl proxy in demo mode
- useDeployments refetch - skip all fetching in demo mode
- useEvents refetch - skip all fetching in demo mode
- useHelmReleases refetch - skip all fetching in demo mode

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
